summary: Iteration 17 - Payment Settings & Notifications APIs Testing Complete. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend E2E tests passed for Settings page (Payment tab) and Customer Menu (category buttons, payment forms).
passed_tests: GET /api/payment-settings - Returns payment settings with hidden secret key
POST /api/payment-settings - Update Stripe settings (enabled, publishable_key, currency, mode)
POST /api/payment-settings - Update ZainCash settings (enabled, phone, name)
POST /api/payment-settings - Update delivery fee and min order amount
GET /api/notifications/pending-orders - Returns orders list with new_count, total_count
POST /api/notifications/mark-seen - Marks order IDs as seen
GET / - Root endpoint returns server status

payment_settings_api.notes: GET/POST /api/payment-settings - Saves and retrieves Stripe, ZainCash, delivery settings

notifications_api.notes: sound-alert, pending-orders, mark-seen APIs all working correctly

settings_page_payment_tab.notes: Payment settings tab shows Stripe config (publishable key, secret key, currency, mode), ZainCash config (phone, name, QR upload), delivery fee settings

customer_menu_categories.notes: Category buttons clearly visible - orange background when selected, gray background with border when unselected

customer_menu_card_payment_form.notes: Shows card number, expiry date, CVV, cardholder name fields with proper styling

customer_menu_zaincash_form.notes: Shows QR code placeholder, wallet number, phone input field

critical_code_review_comments: Payment settings API correctly hides stripe_secret_key in GET response
Notifications APIs use in-memory storage for viewed orders (pending_notifications dict) - consider Redis for production
Category buttons in CustomerMenu.js have clear styling: bg-orange-500 for selected, bg-gray-100 with border for unselected
Card payment form and ZainCash form properly implemented in checkout page
seed_data_creation: Payment settings updated with test Stripe keys and ZainCash info during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 completed. New features tested: 1) Payment Settings APIs (GET/POST /api/payment-settings) - saves Stripe, ZainCash, delivery fee settings to database, 2) Notifications APIs (sound-alert, pending-orders, mark-seen) - for real-time order notifications to cashier, 3) Settings page Payment tab - displays all payment configuration options, 4) Customer Menu category buttons - clearly styled with orange/gray backgrounds, 5) Card payment form - shows card number, expiry, CVV, name fields, 6) ZainCash form - shows QR code and wallet number.
